zh.Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith於1218年1月出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾時，他的父親Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland49歲，母親Bethoc nic Gille Crist34歲。他和Mary Menteith至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1294年6月29日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年76歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾阿福爾。

zh-hans.Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland: 苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith于1218年1月出生在苏格兰艾斯爾凱爾时，他的父亲Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland49岁，母亲Bethoc nic Gille Crist34岁。他和Mary Menteith至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1294年6月29日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾享年76岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾阿福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith was born in January 1218, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, was 49 and his mother, Bethoc nic Gille Crist, was 34. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Mary Menteith. He died on 29 June 1294, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith est né en janvier 1218, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Bethoc nic Gille Crist, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Mary Menteith. Il est décédé le 29 juin 1294, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith im Januar 1218 in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland 49 und seine Mutter Bethoc nic Gille Crist 34. Er hatte mit Mary Menteith mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. Juni 1294 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith è nato il nel gennaio 1218 nel Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Bethoc nic Gille Crist, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Mary Menteith. Morì il 29 giugno 1294, nel Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteithが1218年1月にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルで生まれた時，父Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotlandは49歳，母Bethoc nic Gille Cristは34歳であった。彼はMary Menteithとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1294年6月29日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで76歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーフォイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith(이)가 1218년 1월 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Bethoc nic Gille Crist(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Mary Menteith(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년 6월 29일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압르포일에 묻혔다.

mn.January 1218–29 June 1294: 1218 оны Нэгдүгээр сар–1294 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 29

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith nasceu em janeiro de 1218, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Bethoc nic Gille Crist, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Mary Menteith. Ele faleceu em 29 de junho de 1294, em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith родился январь 1218 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Bethoc nic Gille Crist, 34. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Mary Menteith. Он умер 29 июня 1294 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности абирфоил, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Stewart Earl Of Menteith nació en enero de 1218, en Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Bethoc nic Gille Crist, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Mary Menteith. Murió el 29 de junio de 1294, en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Aberfoyle, Perthshire, Scotland.
